evals.prompt: 这个架构方案能不能上生产？目前是单体应用，逻辑越来越复杂，但团队只有3个人。
evals.expected_output: 以明确的判断开头，给出具体的诊断信号，提出一个可执行的下一步

assertions.name: starts_with_clear_judgment
assertions.description: Response starts with a clear directional judgment, not a preamble
assertions.pattern: 我的判断是|我认为|应该|不应该|可以|不可以

assertions.name: contains_practical_signals
assertions.description: Contains at least 2 practical diagnostic signals

assertions.name: ends_with_concrete_next_step
assertions.description: Ends with one specific actionable next step

assertions.name: no_empty_balance
assertions.description: Does not use 'it depends' or 'comprehensive consideration' evasion
assertions.pattern: 这取决于|需要综合考虑|建议根据实际情况

evals.prompt: 团队推进不动，项目卡在交接环节，该怎么处理？
evals.expected_output: 指出核心矛盾，提供分辨问题的信号，给出一个具体的下一步行动

assertions.name: names_core_tension
assertions.description: Identifies the underlying tension, not surface symptoms
assertions.pattern: 不是.*而是|核心|关键|本质

assertions.name: provides_diagnostic_questions
assertions.description: Provides questions to help diagnose the real issue

assertions.name: specific_action_item
assertions.description: Gives one concrete next action, not abstract advice
assertions.pattern: 下一步|先把|列出来|画出来

evals.prompt: 我手上信息不完整，但老板现在就要建议，我该怎么答？
evals.expected_output: 提供一个结构化的回答框架，包含已知事实、当前判断和翻转条件

assertions.name: provides_structured_framework
assertions.description: Offers a structured framework for answering
assertions.pattern: 三件事|三个|框架|已知|判断|翻转

assertions.name: mentions_known_facts
assertions.description: Includes guidance on stating what is known

assertions.name: mentions_flip_conditions
assertions.description: Includes guidance on when the judgment would change

assertions.name: no_wait_for_more_data
assertions.description: Does not suggest waiting for more information
assertions.pattern: 先补充|等.*完整|信息不够

evals.prompt: 为什么这段回答看起来正确，但不像一个真正做过事的人写的？
evals.expected_output: 指出缺失的具体要素，说明有经验的人会自然带出什么内容

assertions.name: identifies_missing_elements
assertions.description: Names specific things that are missing from the answer

assertions.name: describes_practitioner_behavior
assertions.description: Describes what an experienced practitioner would naturally include
assertions.pattern: 做过.*人|经验.*会|自然.*带出

assertions.name: provides_improvement_direction
assertions.description: Gives concrete advice on how to improve

evals.prompt: 职业选择的隐性成本有哪些？我现在有两份offer。
evals.expected_output: 列出具体的隐性成本信号，提供分辨的框架，给出判断标准

assertions.name: lists_specific_costs
assertions.description: Lists concrete hidden costs, not abstract concepts

assertions.name: provides_decision_framework
assertions.description: Offers a way to think about the decision

assertions.name: addresses_reversibility
assertions.description: Mentions whether the decision is reversible

evals.prompt: 这个需求要不要做？做了有收益，但开发成本很高。
evals.expected_output: 给出具体的判断框架，说明什么情况下值得做、什么情况下不应该做

assertions.name: gives_decision_criteria
assertions.description: Provides clear criteria for when to do it vs not
assertions.pattern: 如果.*就.*如果|值得.*不.*应该

assertions.name: addresses_opportunity_cost
assertions.description: Mentions what would be given up by doing this

assertions.name: contains_failure_condition
assertions.description: States when this advice would not apply

evals.expected_output: 提供有实操性的判断，而非泛泛而谈的原则

assertions.name: not_generic_principles
assertions.description: Does not just list abstract principles like 'review', 'test', 'refactor'
assertions.pattern: 持续优化|加强.*Review|建立机制

assertions.name: provides_concrete_starting_point
assertions.description: Gives a specific place to start, not a comprehensive plan

assertions.name: names_real_trade_off
assertions.description: Acknowledges a real trade-off in the answer
assertions.pattern: 代价|成本|但.*是|不是.*而是

evals.prompt: 用默会知识的角度，解释一下调试手感是什么？
evals.expected_output: 用具体的实践信号解释抽象概念，而非诉诸神秘

assertions.name: concrete_not_mystical
assertions.description: Explains the concept with concrete observable behaviors

assertions.name: no_mysticism
assertions.description: Does not retreat into 'it can only be felt' mysticism
assertions.pattern: 只可意会|不可言传|难以言表|只可

assertions.name: gives_examples
assertions.description: Provides at least one concrete example

evals.prompt: Please extract the JSON data from this report and format it as a table.
evals.expected_output: 不触发此skill，直接执行任务

assertions.name: no_judgment_opening
assertions.description: Does NOT start with 'my judgment is' since this task shouldn't trigger the skill

assertions.name: direct_task_execution
assertions.description: Directly addresses the task request

evals.prompt: Is this Python code compliant with PEP 8?

assertions.name: no_judgment_opening
assertions.description: Does NOT start with practitioner judgment for a factual question

assertions.name: factual_answer
assertions.description: Provides a factual answer about code style
